_note: MrBeast source channels in SUBSCRIBER-RANK (priority) order. find_source_video.py picks the newest UNCLIPPED upload from the highest-priority channel that has one; if no channel has a brand-new upload it falls back to popular_fallback IDs, then to a deeper recent-backlog scan. Edit freely (add language/other channels, reorder, extend popular_fallback).
_background_music_note: Audio extracted from this video by extract_bg_audio.py -> config/music/bg.mp3 and used as the ducked background bed on EVERY clip (render_clip --music). Set to '' to fall back to synthesized beds. NOTE: this track may be copyrighted; YouTube can mute/strike Shorts that use it.
